buggy_code:
df_wide = df.pivot(index='date', columns='metric', values='value')
df_wide = df_wide.fillna(method='ffill')
task: Pivot then forward-fill missing values using the modern pandas API
error_location: line 2: fillna(method='ffill') is deprecated; use ffill() directly
clarification_query: What is the modern pandas method for forward-filling missing values?
corrected_code:
df_wide = df.pivot(index='date', columns='metric', values='value')
df_wide = df_wide.ffill()
explanation: fillna(method='ffill') is deprecated in pandas 2.x. The direct .ffill() method is the modern replacement.
